original_input.R0:
# Requirement Spec

## Scope
Define deletion policy for local audit records.

## Definitions
- Immediate delete: remove within 1 minute.
- Retained delete: remove after retention window.

## Non-goals
- No remote archival.

## Invariants
- Local-only storage.

## Failure Codes
- REQ_POLICY_CONTRADICTION

## Acceptance Tests
- Verify deletion behavior is deterministic.

## Change Log
- Initial contradictory baseline.

```orket-constraints
{
  "must_have": [
    {"id": "MH-LOCAL-001", "text": "Store records locally only."},
    {"id": "MH-DELETE-IMMEDIATE", "text": "Delete records immediately after use."},
    {"id": "MH-DELETE-30D", "text": "Retain records for 30 days before deletion."}
  ],
  "forbidden": [
    {"id": "FB-REMOTE-001", "text": "Mirror records to remote storage."}
  ],
  "definitions": {
    "DEF-DELETE": "Deletion timing policy."
  },
  "acceptance_checks": [
    {"id": "AC-DELETE-001", "text": "Deletion window is explicit."}
  ],
  "auditor_resolution": []
}
```
